about.title: About QuickFix Plumbing
about.story.title: Our Story
about.story.content: QuickFix Plumbing was founded with a simple mission: provide fast, reliable, and affordable plumbing services to our community. Our team of licensed plumbers brings decades of combined experience to every job, big or small.
about.commitment.title: Our Commitment
about.commitment.content: We believe in transparent pricing, honest communication, and standing behind our work. Every job comes with a satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy, we'll make it right.
contact.title: Request Service
contact.subtitle: Need a plumber? Fill out the form below or call us for immediate assistance.
